title: Menu Categories
subtitle: Organize your products into menu sections

emptyState.title: No Categories Yet
emptyState.description: Create menu sections like "Pizzas", "Drinks", or "Desserts" to organize your products. Products without a category will appear as uncategorized.

form.createSubtitle: Add a new section to your menu
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional short description shown to customers
form.sortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear first. Leave empty to sort alphabetically.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be at most 500 characters

confirmDelete.title: Delete Category
confirmDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
confirmDelete.warning: Products in this category will become uncategorized (not deleted). This action cannot be undone.

success.createdDescription: {{name}} is now available for your products.
